positive: Minimalist abstract line art illustration of a graceful mountain range silhouette integrated with stylized bioluminescent flora. The scene should feature clean, continuous lines against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background, with pops of neon cyan and electric lime accents. The design must be highly scalable and striking, suitable for centered apparel printing. Strong contrast, clean vector aesthetic, kawaii style, ethereal, geometric composition, high detail, high contrast, solid white background for print purposes.
